sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63795" key="logxopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λογχο-ποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63795.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">manufactory of spears, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.255</biblScope> </bibl> (prob. cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λοχιποιΐαν</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λογοποιΐαν</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
